'''Padak''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who utilized a customized suit of [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. Part of the [[Qulok's Fist]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunter gang, he worked with them in [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]], and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] operations throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]], and the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Padak assisted the group in its mission to tail the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' on the orders of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], former [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], and engaged the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] in [[Skirmish at Shintel|battle]] in the [[Shintel system/Legends|Shintel system]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Padak was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who worked with [[Qulok's Fist]], a group of criminals who were involved in [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunting, [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]], [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] work. He worked alongside [[Kolig]], the group leader, the [[Death/Legends|murderer]] [[Sufar]], and former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] [[Thanis Gul-Rah]]. Clad in a customized suit of [[Color/Legends|yellow-gold]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]], Padak was the walking arsenal of the group. [[Blaster/Legends|Blasters]] and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] hung from bandoleers and holsters all over his body.<ref name="tdc" />

Along with Qulok's Fist, Padak worked in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]], and the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. During the group's [[Time/Legends|time]] in the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], they were contracted by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]],<ref name="tdc" /> a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who had withdrawn the sector from the Empire and set himself up as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="tsb">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> Sometime during this period, Padak participated in a hunt on a backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that turned into a massacre. This incident led to Thanis Gul-Rah leaving the organization in disgust.<ref name="tdc" />

After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberated]] the sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]<ref name="tdc" /> in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' takes place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Sarne was forced to flee into the Kathol sector.<ref name="tsb" /> Qulok's Fist was hired by the warlord to tail the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', which had been [[DarkStryder Campaign|assigned]] by the New Republic to locate Sarne.<ref name="tdc" />

Sarne, in an effort to delay and harass the ''FarStar'', arranged for the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] to divert to the [[Shintel system/Legends|Shintel system]] through the use of false information passed onto them by one of his [[Agent/Legends|agents]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Olaver Lansel]], on the planet [[Gandle Ott]].<ref name="dirp">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> Sarne intended for the ''FarStar'' to locate him, since he wished to draw regional New Republic forces into a trap of his own design, which would then clear the way for his reconquest of the Kathol sector.<ref name="ko">''[[The Kathol Outback]]''</ref> At [[Shintel]], the ''FarStar'' encountered a [[Imperial Depot 4290-1|supply depot]] that had been abandoned by Sarne. One of the officers at the base, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Palme]]—also a deep-cover agent of Sarne's—managed to upload a virus into the ''FarStar''{{'s}} systems. When the corvette attempted to leave the Shintel [[Star system/Legends|system]], the virus programming overloaded the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], stranding the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. As arranged, Qulok's Fist arrived in their [[Transport/Legends|transport]], the ''[[Steel Fist]]'', and [[Skirmish at Shintel|executed a series of fast attacks]] on the stricken ship. Padak crewed on the ''Steel Fist'' during the brief engagement.<ref name="sd">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Shintel Downtime|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Padak was a man not only looking for a fight, but for a war. His vast array of personal weaponry included a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]], two [[Knife/Legends|knives]], four grenades, and two [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. He also carried a [[magna-grapple]] with seventy-five meters of [[thincord]]. He was trained to use blasters, and was proficient in [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee]] combat and throwing weapons. He could ride animals, and [[Gunner/Legends|operate]] the weapons aboard starships. He could be stealthily if he needed to be, and had first aid training.<ref name="tdc" />

Sealed in his customized armor and helmet, Padak presented an emotionless, anonymous face to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He was considered to be evil and violent, and extremely dangerous. He had no regrets or remorse about killing other beings, and was on the verge of being out of control, which made him unpredictable. Padak's only goal was "to do good death." He followed Kolig's orders, but was disgruntled by the prospect of little killing, preferring heated combat and the obliteration of his enemies. Although a fierce warrior, he was not as tactically minded as the other members of Qulok's Fist, and had to be reigned in during missions to prevent him from blowing a trap or plan.<ref name="tdc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Padak was created for ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. Padak appeared in the "Rogues Gallery" section written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], and was included so the Gamemaster could use him—and Qulok's Fist—in an original adventure. Qulok's Fist would go on to appear in the adventure ''[[Shintel Downtime]]'', although they would only be encountered aboard their ship, the ''Steel Fist''.<ref name="tdc" />
